resposta:
solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def minEnd(self, n: int, x: int) -> int:
        ans = x
        for i in range(29, -1, -1):
            if n > 1 and (x >> i) & 1 == 0:
                ans |= 1 << i
        return ans
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(log x)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The approach iterates over the bits of x from most significant to least, setting bits in the answer as necessary to ensure the bitwise AND of all elements is x while keeping the last element as small as possible.
